   118Ôćĺ    rwa [ÔćÉ hux, ÔćÉ hvy]
   119Ôćĺ  rw [Set.image_preimage_eq_iff]

   125Ôćĺtheorem isClique_map_iff {f : ╬▒ Ôć¬ ╬▓} {t : Set ╬▓} :
   126Ôćĺ    (G.map f).IsClique t Ôćö t.Subsingleton ÔłĘ Ôłâ (s : Set ╬▒), G.IsClique s Ôłž f '' s = t := by
   127Ôćĺ  obtain (ht | ht) := t.subsingleton_or_nontrivial

   132Ôćĺ    (G.map f).IsClique (f '' s) Ôćö G.IsClique s := by

   142Ôćĺ  constructor

   146Ôćĺ      (show s.Finite from Set.Finite.of_finite_image (by simp [hst]) f.injective.injOn)

   149Ôćĺ  simpa using hs.map (f := f)

   153Ôćĺ  obtain (ht | ht) := le_or_gt #t 1

   160Ôćĺprotected theorem IsClique.finsetMap {f : ╬▒ Ôć¬ ╬▓} {s : Finset ╬▒} (h : G.IsClique s) :

   164Ôćĺ/-- If a set of vertices `A` is a clique in subgraph of `G` induced by a superset of `A`,
   165Ôćĺits embedding is a clique in `G`. -/

   172Ôćĺlemma IsClique.sdiff_of_sup_edge {v w : ╬▒} {s : Set ╬▒} (hc : (G ÔŐö edge v w).IsClique s) :

   203Ôćĺ
   204Ôćĺ
   205Ôćĺsection NClique
   206Ôćĺ
   207Ôćĺvariable {n : ÔäĽ} {s : Finset ╬▒}
   208Ôćĺ
   209Ôćĺ/-- An `n`-clique in a graph is a set of `n` vertices which are pairwise connected. -/
   210Ôćĺstructure IsNClique (n : ÔäĽ) (s : Finset ╬▒) : Prop where
   211Ôćĺ  isClique : G.IsClique s

   213Ôćĺ
   214Ôćĺtheorem isNClique_iff : G.IsNClique n s Ôćö G.IsClique s Ôłž #s = n :=
   215Ôćĺ  ÔčĘfun h ÔćŽ ÔčĘh.1, h.2Ôčę, fun h ÔćŽ ÔčĘh.1, h.2ÔčęÔčę
   216Ôćĺ
   217Ôćĺinstance [DecidableEq ╬▒] [DecidableRel G.Adj] {n : ÔäĽ} {s : Finset ╬▒} :

   222Ôćĺ

   224Ôćĺ
   225Ôćĺ@[simp]

   227Ôćĺ
   228Ôćĺtheorem IsNClique.mono (h : G ÔëĄ H) : G.IsNClique n s Ôćĺ H.IsNClique n s := by

   235Ôćĺ

   237Ôćĺ    (G.map f).IsNClique n t Ôćö Ôłâ s : Finset ╬▒, G.IsNClique n s Ôłž s.map f = t := by
   238Ôćĺ  rw [isNClique_iff, isClique_map_finset_iff, or_and_right,
   239Ôćĺ    or_iff_right (by rintro ÔčĘh', rflÔčę; exact h'.not_gt hn)]
   240Ôćĺ  constructor
   241Ôćĺ  ┬Ě rintro ÔčĘÔčĘs, hs, rflÔčę, rflÔčę

   243Ôćĺ  rintro ÔčĘs, hs, rflÔčę

   245Ôćĺ

   261Ôćĺsection DecidableEq

   265Ôćĺprotected theorem IsNClique.insert (hs : G.IsNClique n s) (h : ÔłÇ b Ôłł s, G.Adj a b) :

   284Ôćĺtheorem is3Clique_triple_iff : G.IsNClique 3 {a, b, c} Ôćö G.Adj a b Ôłž G.Adj a c Ôłž G.Adj b c := by

   299Ôćĺ
   300Ôćĺtheorem is3Clique_iff_exists_cycle_length_three :

   307Ôćĺ
   308Ôćĺ/-- If a set of vertices `A` is an `n`-clique in subgraph of `G` induced by a superset of `A`,
   309Ôćĺits embedding is an `n`-clique in `G`. -/
   310Ôćĺtheorem IsNClique.of_induce {S : Subgraph G} {F : Set ╬▒} {s : Finset { x // x Ôłł F }} {n : ÔäĽ}

   317Ôćĺset_option linter.style.whitespace false in -- manual alignment is not recognised
   318Ôćĺlemma IsNClique.erase_of_sup_edge_of_mem [DecidableEq ╬▒] {v w : ╬▒} {s : Finset ╬▒} {n : ÔäĽ}

   331Ôćĺ/-! ### Graphs without cliques -/
   332Ôćĺ
   333Ôćĺ
   334Ôćĺsection CliqueFree
   335Ôćĺ
   336Ôćĺvariable {m n : ÔäĽ}
   337Ôćĺ
   338Ôćĺ/-- `G.CliqueFree n` means that `G` has no `n`-cliques. -/
   339Ôćĺdef CliqueFree (n : ÔäĽ) : Prop :=
   340Ôćĺ  ÔłÇ t, ┬ČG.IsNClique n t
   341Ôćĺ
   342Ôćĺvariable {G H} {s : Finset ╬▒}
   343Ôćĺ
   344Ôćĺtheorem IsNClique.not_cliqueFree (hG : G.IsNClique n s) : ┬ČG.CliqueFree n :=
   345Ôćĺ  fun h ÔćŽ h _ hG
   346Ôćĺ
   347Ôćĺtheorem not_cliqueFree_of_top_embedding {n : ÔäĽ} (f : (ÔŐĄ : SimpleGraph (Fin n)) Ôć¬g G) :
   348Ôćĺ    ┬ČG.CliqueFree n := by
   349Ôćĺ  simp only [CliqueFree, isNClique_iff, isClique_iff_induce_eq, not_forall, Classical.not_not]
   350Ôćĺ  use Finset.univ.map f.toEmbedding
   351Ôćĺ  simp only [card_map, Finset.card_fin, and_true]
   352Ôćĺ  ext ÔčĘv, hvÔčę ÔčĘw, hwÔčę
   353Ôćĺ  simp only [coe_map, Set.mem_image, coe_univ, Set.mem_univ, true_and] at hv hw
   354Ôćĺ  obtain ÔčĘv', rflÔčę := hv
   355Ôćĺ  obtain ÔčĘw', rflÔčę := hw
   356Ôćĺ  simp_rw [RelEmbedding.coe_toEmbedding, comap_adj, Function.Embedding.coe_subtype, f.map_adj_iff,
   357Ôćĺ    top_adj, ne_eq, Subtype.mk.injEq, RelEmbedding.inj]
   358Ôćĺ
   359Ôćĺ/-- An embedding of a complete graph that witnesses the fact that the graph is not clique-free. -/
   360Ôćĺnoncomputable def topEmbeddingOfNotCliqueFree {n : ÔäĽ} (h : ┬ČG.CliqueFree n) :
   361Ôćĺ    (ÔŐĄ : SimpleGraph (Fin n)) Ôć¬g G := by
   362Ôćĺ  simp only [CliqueFree, isNClique_iff, isClique_iff_induce_eq, not_forall, Classical.not_not] at h
   363Ôćĺ  obtain ÔčĘha, hbÔčę := h.choose_spec
   364Ôćĺ  have : (ÔŐĄ : SimpleGraph (Fin #h.choose)) Ôëâg (ÔŐĄ : SimpleGraph h.choose) := by
   365Ôćĺ    apply Iso.completeGraph
   366Ôćĺ    simpa using (Fintype.equivFin h.choose).symm
   367Ôćĺ  rw [ÔćÉ ha] at this
   368Ôćĺ  convert (Embedding.induce ÔćĹh.choose).comp this.toEmbedding
   369Ôćĺ  exact hb.symm
   370Ôćĺ
   371Ôćĺtheorem not_cliqueFree_iff (n : ÔäĽ) : ┬ČG.CliqueFree n Ôćö Nonempty (completeGraph (Fin n) Ôć¬g G) :=
   372Ôćĺ  ÔčĘfun h ÔćŽ ÔčĘtopEmbeddingOfNotCliqueFree hÔčę, fun ÔčĘfÔčę ÔćŽ not_cliqueFree_of_top_embedding fÔčę
   373Ôćĺ
   374Ôćĺtheorem cliqueFree_iff {n : ÔäĽ} : G.CliqueFree n Ôćö IsEmpty (completeGraph (Fin n) Ôć¬g G) := by
   375Ôćĺ  contrapose!; exact not_cliqueFree_iff n
   376Ôćĺ
   377Ôćĺ/-- A simple graph has no `card ╬▓`-cliques iff it does not contain `ÔŐĄ : SimpleGraph ╬▓`. -/
   378Ôćĺtheorem cliqueFree_iff_top_free {╬▓ : Type*} [Fintype ╬▓] :
   379Ôćĺ    G.CliqueFree (card ╬▓) Ôćö (ÔŐĄ : SimpleGraph ╬▓).Free G := by
   380Ôćĺ  rw [ÔćÉ not_iff_not, not_free, not_cliqueFree_iff,
   381Ôćĺ    isContained_congr (Iso.completeGraph (Fintype.equivFin ╬▓)) Iso.refl]
   382Ôćĺ  exact ÔčĘfun ÔčĘfÔčę ÔćŽ ÔčĘf.toCopyÔčę, fun ÔčĘfÔčę ÔćŽ ÔčĘf.topEmbeddingÔčęÔčę
   383Ôćĺ
   384Ôćĺtheorem not_cliqueFree_card_of_top_embedding [Fintype ╬▒] (f : (ÔŐĄ : SimpleGraph ╬▒) Ôć¬g G) :

    54Ôćĺ/-- $T$ is a clique transversal of $G$ if $T$ meets every maximal clique of $G$
    55Ôćĺthat has at least $2$ vertices. -/
    56Ôćĺdef IsCliqueTransversal {n : ÔäĽ} (G : SimpleGraph (Fin n)) (T : Finset (Fin n)) : Prop :=
    57Ôćĺ  ÔłÇ S : Finset (Fin n), IsMaximalCliqueFS G S Ôćĺ 2 ÔëĄ S.card Ôćĺ (T Ôłę S).Nonempty
    58Ôćĺ

    60Ôćĺtransversal of $G$. -/

    62Ôćĺ  sInf { k : ÔäĽ | Ôłâ T : Finset (Fin n), IsCliqueTransversal G T Ôłž T.card = k }

    65Ôćĺ**Erd┼Ĺs Problem 610** (Weak form) [EGT92]:
    66Ôćĺ
    67ÔćĺThere exists a function $\omega : \mathbb{N} \to \mathbb{R}$ with $\omega(n) \to \infty$
    68Ôćĺsuch that for every graph $G$ on $n$ vertices,
    69Ôćĺ$\tau(G) \leq n - \omega(n) \cdot \sqrt{n}$.

    71Ôćĺ@[category research open, AMS 5]

    73Ôćĺ    Ôłâ ¤ë : ÔäĽ Ôćĺ ÔäŁ, Tendsto ¤ë atTop atTop Ôłž

    76Ôćĺ          (cliqueTransversalNum G : ÔäŁ) ÔëĄ (n : ÔäŁ) - ¤ë n * Real.sqrt (n : ÔäŁ) := by
    77Ôćĺ  sorry

    79Ôćĺ/--
    80Ôćĺ**Erd┼Ĺs Problem 610** (Strong form) [EGT92] [Er94] [Er99]:
    81Ôćĺ
    82ÔćĺThere exists $c > 0$ such that for every graph $G$ on $n$ vertices,
    83Ôćĺ$\tau(G) \leq n - c \cdot \sqrt{n \cdot \log n}$.

    85Ôćĺ@[category research open, AMS 5]

    87Ôćĺ    Ôłâ c : ÔäŁ, c > 0 Ôłž

    19Ôćĺ/-!
    20Ôćĺ# Erd┼Ĺs Problem 611
    21Ôćĺ
    22Ôćĺ*Reference:* [erdosproblems.com/611](https://www.erdosproblems.com/611)
    23Ôćĺ
    24ÔćĺLet $\tau(G)$ denote the minimum number of vertices needed to intersect every maximal
    25Ôćĺclique of a graph $G$. Erd┼Ĺs, Gallai, and Tuza conjectured that if every maximal clique
    26Ôćĺof $G$ on $n$ vertices has at least $cn$ vertices (for a fixed constant $c > 0$), then
    27Ôćĺ$\tau(G) = o(n)$.
    28Ôćĺ
    29Ôćĺ[EGT92] Erd┼Ĺs, P., Gallai, T., and Tuza, Z., _Covering the cliques of a graph with vertices_.
    30ÔćĺDiscrete Mathematics (1992).
    31Ôćĺ
    32Ôćĺ[Er94] Erd┼Ĺs, P., _Some old and new problems in various branches of combinatorics_.
    33ÔćĺDiscrete Mathematics (1994).
    34Ôćĺ
    35Ôćĺ[Er99] Erd┼Ĺs, P., _Some of my favourite problems in various branches of combinatorics_.
    36ÔćĺMatematiche (Catania) (1999).
    37Ôćĺ-/
    38Ôćĺ
    39Ôćĺopen SimpleGraph
    40Ôćĺ
    41Ôćĺnamespace Erdos611
    42Ôćĺ
    43Ôćĺ/-- $S$ is a maximal clique of $G$ (as a `Finset`): it is a clique and no vertex
    44Ôćĺ    outside $S$ can be added while preserving the clique property. -/
    45Ôćĺdef IsMaximalCliqueFS {n : ÔäĽ} (G : SimpleGraph (Fin n)) (S : Finset (Fin n)) : Prop :=
    46Ôćĺ  G.IsClique (S : Set (Fin n)) Ôłž
    47Ôćĺ  ÔłÇ v : Fin n, v Ôłë S Ôćĺ ┬ČG.IsClique (ÔćĹ(insert v S) : Set (Fin n))
    48Ôćĺ
    49Ôćĺ/-- $T$ is a clique transversal of $G$ if $T$ meets every maximal clique of $G$
    50Ôćĺ    that has at least $2$ vertices. -/
    51Ôćĺdef IsCliqueTransversal {n : ÔäĽ} (G : SimpleGraph (Fin n)) (T : Finset (Fin n)) : Prop :=
    52Ôćĺ  ÔłÇ S : Finset (Fin n), IsMaximalCliqueFS G S Ôćĺ 2 ÔëĄ S.card Ôćĺ (T Ôłę S).Nonempty
    53Ôćĺ
    54Ôćĺ/-- The clique transversal number $\tau(G)$: the minimum cardinality of a clique
    55Ôćĺ    transversal of $G$. -/
    56Ôćĺnoncomputable def cliqueTransversalNum {n : ÔäĽ} (G : SimpleGraph (Fin n)) : ÔäĽ :=
    57Ôćĺ  sInf { k : ÔäĽ | Ôłâ T : Finset (Fin n), IsCliqueTransversal G T Ôłž T.card = k }
    58Ôćĺ
    59Ôćĺ/-- Every maximal clique of $G$ with at least $2$ vertices has at least $m$ vertices. -/
    60Ôćĺdef AllMaxCliquesAtLeast {n : ÔäĽ} (G : SimpleGraph (Fin n)) (m : ÔäĽ) : Prop :=
    61Ôćĺ  ÔłÇ S : Finset (Fin n), IsMaximalCliqueFS G S Ôćĺ 2 ÔëĄ S.card Ôćĺ m ÔëĄ S.card
    62Ôćĺ
    63Ôćĺ/--
    64Ôćĺ**Erd┼Ĺs Problem 611** (Main conjecture) [EGT92][Er94][Er99]:
    65Ôćĺ
    66ÔćĺIf all maximal cliques in $G$ have at least $cn$ vertices then $\tau(G) = o_c(n)$.
    67Ôćĺ
    68ÔćĺFormulated as: for every $c > 0$ and $\varepsilon > 0$, there exists $N_0$ such that for all
    69Ôćĺ$n \ge N_0$, every graph $G$ on $n$ vertices in which every maximal clique has at
    70Ôćĺleast $\lceil c \cdot n \rceil$ vertices satisfies $\tau(G) \le \varepsilon \cdot n$.
    71Ôćĺ-/
    72Ôćĺ@[category research open, AMS 5]
    73Ôćĺtheorem erdos_611 (c : ÔäŁ) (hc : 0 < c) (hc1 : c ÔëĄ 1) :
    74Ôćĺ    ÔłÇ ╬Á : ÔäŁ, ╬Á > 0 Ôćĺ
    75Ôćĺ    Ôłâ NÔéÇ : ÔäĽ, ÔłÇ n : ÔäĽ, n Ôëą NÔéÇ Ôćĺ
    76Ôćĺ      ÔłÇ G : SimpleGraph (Fin n),
    77Ôćĺ        AllMaxCliquesAtLeast G (Ôîłc * (n : ÔäŁ)ÔîëÔéŐ) Ôćĺ
    78Ôćĺ        (cliqueTransversalNum G : ÔäŁ) ÔëĄ ╬Á * (n : ÔäŁ) := by
    79Ôćĺ  sorry
    80Ôćĺ
    81Ôćĺ/--
    82Ôćĺ**Erd┼Ĺs Problem 611** (Known bound, Erd┼Ĺs-Gallai-Tuza) [EGT92]:
    83Ôćĺ
    84ÔćĺIf every maximal clique of $G$ on $n$ vertices has at least $k$ vertices then
    85Ôćĺ$\tau(G) \le n - \sqrt{kn}$.
    86Ôćĺ-/
    87Ôćĺ@[category research solved, AMS 5]
    88Ôćĺtheorem erdos_611.variants.known_bound (n : ÔäĽ) (hn : n Ôëą 1)
    89Ôćĺ    (G : SimpleGraph (Fin n)) (k : ÔäĽ) (hk : k Ôëą 1)
    90Ôćĺ    (hclique : AllMaxCliquesAtLeast G k) :
    91Ôćĺ    (cliqueTransversalNum G : ÔäŁ) ÔëĄ (n : ÔäŁ) - Real.sqrt ((k : ÔäŁ) * (n : ÔäŁ)) := by
    92Ôćĺ  sorry
    93Ôćĺ
    94Ôćĺ/--
    95Ôćĺ**Erd┼Ĺs Problem 611** (Bollob├ís-Erd┼Ĺs):
    96Ôćĺ
    97ÔćĺIf every maximal clique of $G$ on $n$ vertices has at least $n + 3 - 2\sqrt{n}$ vertices
    98Ôćĺthen $\tau(G) \le 1$. (This threshold is best possible.)
    99Ôćĺ-/
   100Ôćĺ@[category research solved, AMS 5]
   101Ôćĺtheorem erdos_611.variants.bollobas_erdos (n : ÔäĽ) (hn : n Ôëą 4)
   102Ôćĺ    (G : SimpleGraph (Fin n)) :
   103Ôćĺ    AllMaxCliquesAtLeast G (n + 3 - 2 * Nat.sqrt n) Ôćĺ
   104Ôćĺ    cliqueTransversalNum G ÔëĄ 1 := by
   105Ôćĺ  sorry
   106Ôćĺ
   107Ôćĺend Erdos611

    18Ôćĺ
    19Ôćĺ/-!
    20Ôćĺ# Erd┼Ĺs Problem 151
    21Ôćĺ
    22ÔćĺErd┼Ĺs and Gallai conjectured that the clique transversal number of any graph on $n$ vertices
    23Ôćĺis at most $n - H(n)$, where $H(n)$ is the minimum independence number over all triangle-free
    24Ôćĺgraphs on $n$ vertices.
    25Ôćĺ
    26Ôćĺ*Reference:* [erdosproblems.com/151](https://www.erdosproblems.com/151)
    27Ôćĺ
    28Ôćĺ[Er88] Erd┼Ĺs, P., _Problems and results on chromatic numbers in finite and infinite graphs_,
    29Ôćĺ1988, p.82.
    30Ôćĺ
    31Ôćĺ[EGT92] Erd┼Ĺs, P., Gallai, T. and Tuza, Zs., _Covering the cliques of a graph with vertices_,
    32Ôćĺ1992, p.280.
    33Ôćĺ-/
    34Ôćĺ
    35Ôćĺopen SimpleGraph
    36Ôćĺ
    37Ôćĺnamespace Erdos151
    38Ôćĺ
    39Ôćĺ/-- $S$ is a maximal clique of $G$ (represented as a `Finset`): it is a clique and
    40Ôćĺno vertex outside $S$ can be added while preserving the clique property. -/
    41Ôćĺdef IsMaximalCliqueFS {n : ÔäĽ} (G : SimpleGraph (Fin n)) (S : Finset (Fin n)) : Prop :=
    42Ôćĺ  G.IsClique (S : Set (Fin n)) Ôłž
    43Ôćĺ  ÔłÇ v : Fin n, v Ôłë S Ôćĺ ┬ČG.IsClique (ÔćĹ(insert v S) : Set (Fin n))
    44Ôćĺ
    45Ôćĺ/-- $T$ is a clique transversal of $G$ if $T$ has non-empty intersection with every
    46Ôćĺmaximal clique of $G$ that has at least $2$ vertices. -/
    47Ôćĺdef IsCliqueTransversal {n : ÔäĽ} (G : SimpleGraph (Fin n)) (T : Finset (Fin n)) : Prop :=
    48Ôćĺ  ÔłÇ S : Finset (Fin n), IsMaximalCliqueFS G S Ôćĺ 2 ÔëĄ S.card Ôćĺ (T Ôłę S).Nonempty
    49Ôćĺ
    50Ôćĺ/-- The clique transversal number $\tau(G)$: the minimum cardinality of a clique
    51Ôćĺtransversal of $G$. -/
    52Ôćĺnoncomputable def cliqueTransversalNumber {n : ÔäĽ} (G : SimpleGraph (Fin n)) : ÔäĽ :=
    53Ôćĺ  sInf { k : ÔäĽ | Ôłâ T : Finset (Fin n), IsCliqueTransversal G T Ôłž T.card = k }
    54Ôćĺ
    55Ôćĺ/-- $S$ is an independent set in $G$: no two distinct vertices of $S$ are adjacent. -/
    56Ôćĺdef IsIndependentSet {n : ÔäĽ} (G : SimpleGraph (Fin n)) (S : Finset (Fin n)) : Prop :=
    57Ôćĺ  ÔłÇ u v : Fin n, u Ôłł S Ôćĺ v Ôłł S Ôćĺ u Ôëá v Ôćĺ ┬ČG.Adj u v
    58Ôćĺ
    59Ôćĺ/-- The independence number $\alpha(G)$: the maximum cardinality of an independent set. -/
    60Ôćĺnoncomputable def independenceNumber {n : ÔäĽ} (G : SimpleGraph (Fin n)) : ÔäĽ :=
    61Ôćĺ  sSup { k : ÔäĽ | Ôłâ S : Finset (Fin n), IsIndependentSet G S Ôłž S.card = k }
    62Ôćĺ
    63Ôćĺ/-- $H(n)$ is maximal such that every triangle-free graph on $n$ vertices contains
    64Ôćĺan independent set of size $H(n)$; equivalently, $H(n)$ is the minimum
    65Ôćĺindependence number over all triangle-free graphs on $n$ vertices. -/
    66Ôćĺnoncomputable def H (n : ÔäĽ) : ÔäĽ :=
    67Ôćĺ  sInf { k : ÔäĽ | Ôłâ G : SimpleGraph (Fin n), G.CliqueFree 3 Ôłž independenceNumber G = k }
    68Ôćĺ
    69Ôćĺ/--
    70ÔćĺErd┼Ĺs Problem 151 [Er88, p.82] [EGT92, p.280] (problem of Erd┼Ĺs and Gallai):
    71ÔćĺIf $G$ is a graph on $n$ vertices then $\tau(G) \leq n - H(n)$,
    72Ôćĺwhere $\tau(G)$ is the clique transversal number of $G$ and $H(n)$ is the maximum $k$
    73Ôćĺsuch that every triangle-free graph on $n$ vertices contains an independent set
    74Ôćĺof size $k$.
    75Ôćĺ-/
    76Ôćĺ@[category research open, AMS 5]
    77Ôćĺtheorem erdos_151 : answer(sorry) Ôćö
    78Ôćĺ    ÔłÇ (n : ÔäĽ) (G : SimpleGraph (Fin n)),
    79Ôćĺ      cliqueTransversalNumber G ÔëĄ n - H n := by
    80Ôćĺ  sorry
    81Ôćĺ
    82Ôćĺend Erdos151

    30Ôćĺvariable {╬▒ : Type*} [Fintype ╬▒] [DecidableEq ╬▒]
    31Ôćĺ
    32Ôćĺ/-- `Ls G` is the maximum number of leaves over all spanning trees of `G`.
    33ÔćĺIt is defined to be `0` when `G` is not connected. -/
    34Ôćĺnoncomputable def Ls (G : SimpleGraph ╬▒) [DecidableRel G.Adj] : ÔäŁ :=
    35Ôćĺ  letI spanningTrees := { T : Subgraph G | T.IsSpanning Ôłž IsTree T.coe }
    36Ôćĺ  letI leaves (T : Subgraph G) := T.verts.toFinset.filter (fun v => T.degree v = 1)
    37Ôćĺ  letI num_leaves (T : Subgraph G) := (leaves T).card
    38Ôćĺ  sSup (Set.image (fun T => (num_leaves T : ÔäŁ)) spanningTrees)
    39Ôćĺ
    40Ôćĺ/-- `n G` is the number of vertices of `G` as a real number. -/
    41Ôćĺnoncomputable def n (_ : SimpleGraph ╬▒) : ÔäŁ := Fintype.card ╬▒
    42Ôćĺ
    43Ôćĺ/-- `m G` is the size of a maximum matching of `G`. -/
    44Ôćĺnoncomputable def m (G : SimpleGraph ╬▒) [DecidableRel G.Adj] : ÔäŁ :=
    45Ôćĺ  let matchings := { M : Subgraph G | M.IsMatching }

    47Ôćĺ
    48Ôćĺ/-- The maximum cardinality among all independent sets `s`

    51Ôćĺnoncomputable def aprime (G : SimpleGraph ╬▒) [DecidableRel G.Adj] : ÔäŁ :=
    52Ôćĺ  letI indep_sets : Finset (Finset ╬▒) := univ.powerset.filter (fun s => G.IsIndepSet (s : Set ╬▒))
    53Ôćĺ  letI diff (s : Finset ╬▒) : ÔäĄ := (s.card : ÔäĄ) - (Ôőâ v Ôłł (s : Set ╬▒), G.neighborSet v).toFinset.card
    54Ôćĺ  letI max_diff := (indep_sets.image diff).max
    55Ôćĺ  letI critical_sets := indep_sets.filter (fun s ÔćŽ diff s = max_diff.getD 0)
    56Ôćĺ  letI max_card := (critical_sets.image Finset.card).max
    57Ôćĺ  (max_card.getD 0 : ÔäŁ)
    58Ôćĺ
    59Ôćĺ/-- `largestInducedForestSize G` is the size of a largest induced forest of `G`. -/
    60Ôćĺnoncomputable def largestInducedForestSize (G : SimpleGraph ╬▒) : ÔäĽ :=
    61Ôćĺ  sSup { n | Ôłâ s : Finset ╬▒, (G.induce s).IsAcyclic Ôłž s.card = n }
    62Ôćĺ
    63Ôćĺ/-- The degree sequence of a graph, sorted in nondecreasing order. -/
    64Ôćĺnoncomputable def degreeSequence (G : SimpleGraph ╬▒) [DecidableRel G.Adj] : List ÔäĽ :=
    65Ôćĺ  (Finset.univ.val.map fun v : ╬▒ => G.degree v).sort (┬Ě ÔëĄ ┬Ě)
    66Ôćĺ
    67Ôćĺ/--
    68ÔćĺThe maximum number of occurrences of any term of the degree sequence of `G`.
    69Ôćĺ-/

    71Ôćĺ  letI degs := degreeSequence G
    72Ôćĺ  (List.max? (degs.map (fun d => degs.count d))).getD 0
    73Ôćĺ
    74Ôćĺ/-- `largestInducedBipartiteSubgraphSize G` is the size of a largest induced
    75Ôćĺbipartite subgraph of `G`. -/
    76Ôćĺnoncomputable def largestInducedBipartiteSubgraphSize (G : SimpleGraph ╬▒) : ÔäĽ :=
    77Ôćĺ  sSup { n | Ôłâ s : Finset ╬▒, (G.induce s).IsBipartite Ôłž s.card = n }
    78Ôćĺ
    79Ôćĺ/-- `b G` is the number of vertices of a largest induced bipartite subgraph of `G`.
    80ÔćĺReturned as a real number. -/
    81Ôćĺnoncomputable def b (G : SimpleGraph ╬▒) : ÔäŁ :=
